title: limonium botschantzevii
intro: Limonium botschantzevii, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limonium botschantzevii include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tea by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
